name: TVX Gold, Inc.
description: TVX Gold, Inc. was a Canadian-based mining company primarily focused on the exploration, development, and operation of gold mining properties. The company maintained a significant international presence, with key assets including interests in gold mines across Brazil, Canada, Chile, and Greece. A major component of its operations was the TVX Normandy Americas partnership, a joint venture with Normandy Mining Ltd. that managed several mining interests in the Americas. The company was headquartered in Toronto, Ontario, and was publicly traded on the Toronto Stock Exchange before being acquired by Kinross Gold Corporation in 2003.
